title: Grayed Out
description: A GUI texturepack with a gray style
body: ## 🛠️ Features: - **Hotbar:** Crossfade from Black to white - **Hearts:** Textured the Hardcore and normal hearts and made Wither hearts more noticeable - **Hunger:** Changed all variants ## 📣 Recommendation: I highly recommend the texturepack [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) to fit the look of the hotbar You can also check out [Black n' White](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-n-white) by [Drqad](https://modrinth.com/user/Drqad), which inspired me to create this texture pack. ## 🧩 Compatibility: The pack needs either the mods Polytone or Optifine to display the xp-number ### 📝 Versions: Fully Supported: Minecraft 1.21 and up
